'''鈭歯g-ng-dh''' ('''kangangadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mabble|mabble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ng-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mabble|mabble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-ng-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kangangadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingangadh|thingangadh]] || [[word:jingangadh|jingangadh]] || [[word:shingangadh|shingangadh]] || [[word:kingangadh|kingangadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungangadh|thuthungangadh]] || [[word:jujungangadh|jujungangadh]] || [[word:shushungangadh|shushungangadh]] || [[word:kukungangadh|kukungangadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungangadh|thungangadh]] || [[word:jungangadh|jungangadh]] || [[word:shungangadh|shungangadh]] || [[word:kungangadh|kungangadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungangadh|thungangadh]] || [[word:jungangadh|jungangadh]] || [[word:shungangadh|shungangadh]] || [[word:kungangadh|kungangadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengangadh|thengangadh]] || [[word:jengangadh|jengangadh]] || [[word:shengangadh|shengangadh]] || [[word:kengangadh|kengangadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongangadh|thothongangadh]] || [[word:jojongangadh|jojongangadh]] || [[word:shoshongangadh|shoshongangadh]] || [[word:kokongangadh|kokongangadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongangadh|thongangadh]] || [[word:jongangadh|jongangadh]] || [[word:shongangadh|shongangadh]] || [[word:kongangadh|kongangadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongangadh|thongangadh]] || [[word:jongangadh|jongangadh]] || [[word:shongangadh|shongangadh]] || [[word:kongangadh|kongangadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngangadh|th忙ngangadh]] || [[word:j忙ngangadh|j忙ngangadh]] || [[word:sh忙ngangadh|sh忙ngangadh]] || [[word:k忙ngangadh|k忙ngangadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangangadh|thathangangadh]] || [[word:jajangangadh|jajangangadh]] || [[word:shashangangadh|shashangangadh]] || [[word:kakangangadh|kakangangadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangangadh|thangangadh]] || [[word:jangangadh|jangangadh]] || [[word:shangangadh|shangangadh]] || [[word:kangangadh|kangangadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangangadh|thangangadh]] || [[word:jangangadh|jangangadh]] || [[word:shangangadh|shangangadh]] || [[word:kangangadh|kangangadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangangadh|shangangadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangangadh|goshangangadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangangadh|gokishangangadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangangadhn眉|shangangadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkn眉|goshangangadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangangadhn眉|gokishangangadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangangadhsh毛|shangangadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangangadhnksh毛|goshangangadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangangadhsh毛|gokishangangadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangangadhro|shangangadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkro|goshangangadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangangadhro|gokishangangadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangangadhmu|shangangadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkmu|goshangangadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangangadhmu|gokishangangadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangangadhsher|shangangadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangangadhnksher|goshangangadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangangadhsher|gokishangangadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangangadhng|shangangadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkng|goshangangadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangangadhng|gokishangangadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangangadhya|shangangadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkya|goshangangadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangangadhya|gokishangangadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangangadhyam|shangangadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkyam|goshangangadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangangadhyam|gokishangangadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangangadhn眉sh毛|shangangadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkn眉sh毛|goshangangadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangangadhn眉sh毛|gokishangangadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangangadhn眉ro|shangangadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkn眉ro|goshangangadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangangadhn眉ro|gokishangangadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangangadhn眉mu|shangangadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkn眉mu|goshangangadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangangadhn眉mu|gokishangangadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangangadhsh毛n眉|shangangadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangangadhnksh毛n眉|goshangangadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangangadhsh毛n眉|gokishangangadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangangadhsh毛ro|shangangadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangangadhnksh毛ro|goshangangadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangangadhsh毛ro|gokishangangadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangangadhsh毛mu|shangangadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangangadhnksh毛mu|goshangangadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangangadhsh毛mu|gokishangangadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangangadhron眉|shangangadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkron眉|goshangangadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangangadhron眉|gokishangangadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangangadhrosh毛|shangangadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkrosh毛|goshangangadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangangadhrosh毛|gokishangangadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangangadhromu|shangangadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkromu|goshangangadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangangadhromu|gokishangangadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangangadhmun眉|shangangadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkmun眉|goshangangadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangangadhmun眉|gokishangangadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangangadhmush毛|shangangadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkmush毛|goshangangadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangangadhmush毛|gokishangangadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangangadhmuro|shangangadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangangadhnkmuro|goshangangadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangangadhmuro|gokishangangadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
